metadata.budget_definition: per-sample top-k over internal candidates; k=floor(0.10 * candidate_count)
metadata.candidate_definition: both endpoints inside predicted node scope and base edge proposal did not select the edge
notes: Step 9c is an operating-mode evaluation, not a training run.
